name: Inventory Technician Offboarding Process
description: Inventory-related offboarding process for departing technicians

steps.title: Process Inventory Returns
steps.description: Handle return of all assigned inventory items

substeps.title: Scan all returned items
substeps.description: Scan barcodes/tags of all returned inventory items

substeps.title: Verify condition of returned items
substeps.description: Inspect condition and functionality of returned items

substeps.title: Update inventory management system
substeps.description: Mark items as returned and available for reallocation

steps.title: Reconcile Outstanding Assignments
steps.description: Verify all assigned items are accounted for

substeps.title: Check technician assignment list
substeps.description: Review all items assigned to departing technician

substeps.title: Identify any missing items
substeps.description: Document any items not returned by technician

substeps.title: Close all technician assignments
substeps.description: Formally close all inventory assignments for technician
